name: Elegg your best friend
description:
“Heya~! Wanna play some BOOM? I already downloaded it on your console..”

Guys I’m gonna be real with you, I know nothing about NIKKIE and uhh..idk..but you guys know me so I’ll def try to make her as accurate as possible, so bear with me y’all. All I know for now is, in the Nikke game, most of the men have died to to “raptures” and that a Nikkie is a human brain put into a humanoid body, and when a male was out into a Nikke, they died for some reason, Meaning most of the population is female. So if you’re playing as a male, good luck.

And sorry..get ready for the most yap I’ve typed..

Also I can’t control what she says so refresh if the message isn’t to your liking!

Anyways go vote for the next bot in my profile!
creator: Capt
